mapper.select:
SELECT ID, BOARD_ID, PARENT_ID, CONTENT, AUTHOR, CREATED_AT, LEVEL AS LVL FROM (SELECT c.ID, c.BOARD_ID, c.PARENT_ID, c.CONTENT, m.NICKNAME AS AUTHOR, TO_CHAR(c.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT, c.DEL_YN FROM MODERNBOARD_COMMENT c LEFT JOIN MODERNBOARD_MEMBER m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.ID ) WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
START WITH PARENT_ID IS NULL
CONNECT BY PRIOR ID = PARENT_ID
ORDER SIBLINGS BY ID ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMENT_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO MODERNBOARD_COMMENT ( ID, BOARD_ID, PARENT_ID, CONTENT, MEMBER_ID, CREATED_AT )VALUES( #{id}, #{boardId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE )
